pr.title: Non-record: LeakyReLU² + LAWA + Ramping WD + Val Training (val_bpb=1.2302, 1xH100)

output.summary: Stacked LeakyReLU² baseline with LAWA averaging, lzma compression, ramped WD, and val-set training on 1xH100 for a compact leaderboard entry.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Explicitly trains on the validation shard per rules, so the run is val-only.
techniques: LeakyReLU² blocks with LAWA checkpoint averaging
lzma compression for tighter artifact size
Ramping WD schedule during warmdown with val-train
